news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on May 16, 2025, Sandstorm Gold Ltd. (NYSE: SAND) (TSX: SSL) revealed that in continuation of their communication on May 12, 2025, Institutional Shareholder Services Inc. ("ISS") has issued an updated report.
news.headline: Sandstorm Gold Royalties receives positive voting recommendations from ISS & Glass Lewis for 2025 shareholder meeting.

news.summary: In Tacoma, Washington on May 16, 2025, Columbia Banking System, Inc. declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.36 per common share. This company, trading as Nasdaq: COLB and owning Umpqua Bank, confirmed that the dividend is set to be issued on June 16, 2025, following approval by the Board of Directors. Shareholders are expected to benefit from this dividend payout.
news.headline: Columbia Banking System to pay $0.36 per common share dividend on June 16, 2025.

news.summary: U.S. stock futures rose after a mixed close on Thursday, with major benchmark indices trading higher in premarket. The S&P 500 index saw its fourth day of gains and turned positive for the year at the start of the week. Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell hinted at potential shifts in policy regarding inflation and employment strategies after a comprehensive review scheduled for 2025. The Nasdaq dropped despite positive momentum from partnerships with the Middle East. The 10-year Treasury bond yielded 4.40% and the two-year bond was at 3.95%. Markets are pricing a 91.8% likelihood of the Federal Reserve maintaining current interest rates in its June meeting. The SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust and Invesco QQQ Trust ETF rose in premarket trading. Sectors like utilities, consumer staples, and real estate performed well, contributing to the S&P 500's fourth consecutive session of gains. The index rose roughly 4.5% week-to-date, while the Dow increased by about 2.6%, and the Nasdaq surged by 6.6%. Tech giants like Nvidia, Tesla, Amazon, and Alphabet saw substantial weekly gains of around 15% each.
news.headline: Wall Street set to open higher after S&P 500's 4-day gains, Powell hints at policy shifts. 10-year Treasury yield at 4.40%, 2-year at 3.95%. Markets predict 91.8% probability of unchanged interest rates in June. S&P 500 ETF Trust up 0.14%, Nasdaq 100 ETF up 0.16%. S&P 500 climbed 4.5% week-to-date, Dow up 2.6%, Nasdaq up 6.6%, with notable gains in tech giants.

news.summary: A two-day seminar titled "Reviewing and Negotiating Technology Transfer and Licensing Agreements Training Course" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The online event is scheduled for June 16-17, 2025. Technology transfer and licensing agreements play a crucial role in the development of new business opportunities and international expansion, commonly utilized by both commercial entities and public institutions. This seminar aims to provide practical guidance on the legal and commercial aspects essential to these agreements.
news.headline: "2-day online training on Reviewing & Negotiating Technology Transfer and Licensing Agreements on June 16-17, 2025"

news.summary: On Friday, Dow Jones futures saw an increase in anticipation of significant inflation numbers. Applied Materials, a supplier for Nvidia, experienced a sharp decline in earnings. The rise in Dow Jones futures comes as investors await important inflation data. Applied Materials, a key supplier for Nvidia, took a hit due to disappointing earnings.
news.headline: Dow Jones futures up before inflation data; Nvidia supplier Applied Materials drops on earnings.

news.summary: In Tampa, Florida, Coca-Cola Beverages Florida, LLC (Coke Florida) has recently promoted Jamaal Medley to Vice President, Field Franchise Operations. The company's operations cover 47 counties in Florida, divided into 18 territories. In his new role, Jamaal will offer strategic and operational guidance to the general managers in each territory, overseeing the coordination of sales, manufacturing, distribution, warehouse, and merchandising activities to enhance local business.
news.headline: Jamaal Medley promoted to Vice President of Field Franchise Operations at Coke Florida overseeing operations in 47 counties.
Equity increase: DRIS reported a rise in shares by 10%, amounting to $5 million.

news.summary: Hackensack, New Jersey - On May 16, 2025, the Downtown Hackensack Main Street Business Alliance (MSBA) announced a call for vocalists, guitarists, trumpet players, duos, and street performers to participate in revitalizing the city's cultural scene. This initiative aims to showcase the talents of up-and-coming artists and add vibrancy to Downtown Hackensack. Interested individuals in bringing their skills to the city's streets can contact the MSBA for more information and to be a part of shaping the cultural heartbeat of Hackensack.
news.headline: Downtown Hackensack launches "Music on Main Busking" program, seeking summer performers to bring cultural heartbeat to life. #MusicOnMainHackensack

news.summary: In Las Vegas, KB Home (NYSE: KBH) unveiled Groves at Caldwell Park in Summerlin, a prime master plan area. The community boasts new homes tailored to contemporary lifestyles, showcasing trendy elements such as spacious great rooms visible from modern kitchens, bedroom suites with walk-in closets, plenty of storage, and attractive outdoor living areas. The two-story townhomes mark KB Home's commitment to excellence in housing construction within the U.S.
news.headline: KB Home opens Groves at Caldwell Park, new townhome community at Summerlin in Las Vegas. Home features include modern kitchens, walk-in closets, and outdoor living spaces. (Word count: 24)

news.summary: In Tustin, California, KB Home (NYSE: KBH) has unveiled Stafford Glen, providing a unique chance to own a new townhome in a sought-after location. The homes, tailored to modern living, boast features such as contemporary kitchens opening to spacious great rooms, bedroom suites with walk-in closets, and generous storage space. This three-story community offers a prime opportunity for potential homeowners seeking a blend of convenience and comfort.
news.headline: KB Home opens new townhome community in Tustin, California with modern kitchens, walk-in closets, and ample storage space.

news.summary: KB Home, a leading U.S. homebuilder (NYSE: KBH), unveiled three new-home collections - Wildflower, Villas, and Starlight - within the Windler master plan in Aurora, Colorado. These homes cater to modern living, offering contemporary kitchens overlooking spacious great rooms, bedroom suites with walk-in closets, and generous storage space. The sought-after development features two-story, single-family homes, meeting the demand of today's lifestyle.
news.headline: KB Home opens 3 new communities in Windler, Aurora, CO. Features modern homes in popular master plan. #KBHome #Aurora #Windler

news.summary: Herc Holdings Inc. (NYSE: HRI), a prominent equipment rental provider in North America, disclosed the declaration of its quarterly dividend at $0.70 per share. Shareholders as of May 30, 2025, will receive the dividend on June 13, 2025. Herc Holdings Inc., established in 1965, operates through its subsidiary Herc Rentals Inc., boasting 453 locations nationwide.
news.headline: Herc Holdings Inc. (NYSE: HRI) declares a quarterly dividend of $0.70 per share, payable on June 13, 2025. Founded in 1965.

news.summary: EMCOR Group, Inc. (NYSE: EME) disclosed that Tony Guzzi, Chairman, President, and CEO, along with Jason Nalbandian, Senior VP and CFO, and Andy Backman, VP of Investor Relations, will conduct individual meetings at upcoming investor conferences. These events include the KeyBanc Industrials & Basic Materials Conference scheduled for Wednesday, May 28, 2025, in Boston, Massachusetts. Interested investors are advised to reach out to secure their meetings with the company representatives.
news.headline: EMCOR Group, Inc. (NYSE: EME) to participate in investor conferences on May 28, 2025 in Boston. CEO, CFO, and VP to host meetings. Contact KeyBanc for interest.

news.headline: Controversy over Trump's AI deals in Gulf after multibillion $ investments by Saudis and Emiratis, facing pushback.

news.summary: In Seattle, the average buyer's agent commission stood at 2.40% for homes sold in Q1. This is a slight increase from 2.37% in Q4 2024 and 2.36% in Q3 2024 after the implementation of new National Association of Realtors (NAR) commissions rules. However, it is a decrease from 2.43% in Q1 2024. This data comes from a report by Redfin, a technology-driven real estate brokerage listed on NASDAQ as RDFN.
news.headline: Buyer's agent commission at 2.40% in Q1, slightly up from 2.37% in Q4, but down from 2.43% in Q1 2024 post NAR rules change.

news.summary: IQVIA, a prominent global provider of clinical research services, commercial insights, and healthcare intelligence to the life sciences and healthcare sectors, has revealed a strategic partnership with SCRI Development Innovations, the contract research organization segment of Sarah Cannon Research Institute. This collaboration is designed to revamp oncology trials for biopharmaceutical partners globally. The alliance merges the strengths of IQVIA and SCRI Development to enhance oncology trial processes for better outcomes.
news.headline: IQVIA and SCRI collaborate to speed up global oncology trials for biopharma; aims to transform trials.

news.summary: In a recent development, Deutsche Post, the largest postal service provider in Europe, has entered into a new agreement with Diebold Nixdorf (NYSE: DBD). The agreement involves the deployment of point-of-sale (POS) systems and a five-year service contract. Under this deal, Diebold Nixdorf will be responsible for upgrading the branch infrastructure in around (insert number) locations operated by Deutsche Post. This collaboration signifies a significant step towards enhancing the operational efficiency and customer service offerings of Deutsche Post through modernized systems provided by Diebold Nixdorf.
news.headline: Deutsche Post partners with Diebold Nixdorf for branch modernization in Germany, including POS systems and service contract.

news.summary: A company, Eagle Materials Inc. (NYSE: EXP), revealed its intentions to amplify and update its Duke, Oklahoma gypsum wallboard plant through its subsidiary, American Gypsum Company. The plant caters to clients across the South and Sunbelt regions, benefitting from close proximity to extensive natural gypsum reserves. This venture aims to bolster American Gypsum’s capacity to accommodate consumers within rapidly growing markets, solidifying its status as a cost-efficient leader in the wallboard sector.
news.headline: Eagle Materials to modernize Oklahoma wallboard plant for high-growth markets; expanding production capacity.

news.summary: In New York, Perfect Corp. (NYSE: PERF) has unveiled YouCam AI Chat, an AI assistant designed to assist users with creating, planning, learning, and finding inspiration. The company, known for its billion-download YouCam app suite, is utilizing advanced AI technology such as GPT-4.1, GPT-4o, GPT-4o mini, and DeepSeek R1 to power the new assistant. YouCam AI Chat aims to provide personalized and interactive experiences for users.
news.headline: Perfect Corp. (NYSE: PERF) launches YouCam AI Chat, an AI assistant for planning, learning, and inspiration. Powered by leading multi-model AI tech, it offers personalized experiences.

news.summary: Panera Brands Inc., featuring Panera Bread, Einstein Bros. Bagels, and Caribou Coffee, has appointed José Cil as Chairman of its Board of Directors. Cil will collaborate with the company's leadership to enhance growth and offer unique experiences to guests. He takes over from Patrick Grismer.
news.headline: José Cil appointed Chairman of Panera Brands; will work closely with leadership team to drive growth and enhance guest experiences.

news.summary: RBC Bearings Incorporated, a prominent global manufacturer of precision bearings and components for industrial, defense, and aerospace sectors, released its fiscal 2025 fourth-quarter and full-year results. In the fourth quarter, the company recorded net sales of $437.7 million, marking a 5.8% rise from the previous year. Notably, Aerospace/Defense segment revenues surged by 10.6%, while Industrial segment saw a 3.3% increase. The gross margin for the quarter stood at 44.2%.
news.headline: RBC Bearings Inc. reports Q4 FY2025 results: Net sales up 5.8% to $437.7 million, Aerospace/Defense up by 10.6%, Industrial up 3.3%.

news.summary: Today, in Chicago on May 16, 2025, Hub International Limited (Hub), a prominent global insurance brokerage and financial services firm, disclosed the acquisition of Fifth Avenue Insurance Agency's assets. The specific financial details of the deal were not revealed to the public. Fifth Avenue, formerly an independent insurance agency, is now under the ownership of Hub International Limited.
news.headline: Hub International acquires Fifth Avenue Insurance Agency in Oklahoma, strengthens commercial insurance capabilities. No disclosed terms.

news.summary: Tractor offers a unique experience at McCormick Place in Chicago from May 17 to 20, 2025. The company showcases bold organic beverages and innovative foodservice concepts, inviting guests to explore a booth where soil and soul intersect. This immersive experience features captivating storytelling and an array of products that redefine traditional conventions. Step inside this new kind of booth to discover a fresh perspective on agriculture, with a focus on sustainable practices and authentic narratives.
news.headline: Tractor Beverage debuts at National Restaurant Show with organic drinks, immersive storytelling. McCormick Place, Chicago, May 17-20, 2025.

news.summary: Cryptocurrencies are seeing a positive trend with Bitcoin gaining 1.3% at $103,680.88, Ethereum up 2.7% at $2,627.97, and Solana rising by 1.2% to $173.2. XRP dropped by 1.8% to $2.43, Dogecoin increased by 0.5% to $0.2278, and Shiba Inu went up by 0.3% to $0.00001507. Bitcoin and Ethereum saw a 5.4% and 1.3% increase in large transaction volumes, respectively. ETH's daily active addresses rose by 1.6%, while Bitcoin's declined by 6.3%. Coinglass data indicates 123,626 traders were liquidated in the past day, totaling $340.61 million. Noted crypto analyst Ali Martinez observed Bitcoin whales selling over 30,000 BTC in the last 72 hours. Trader Ted Pillows predicts a bullish breakout for Bitcoin soon, likely nearing an all-time high.
news.headline: Major cryptocurrencies see gains: Bitcoin $103,680.88 (+1.3%), Ethereum $2,627.97 (+2.7%), XRP $2.43 (-1.8%), Dogecoin $0.2278 (+0.5%). Bitcoin and Ethereum large transaction volume increases by 5.4% and 1.3%; 123,626 traders liquidated in past 24 hours for $340.61 million. Bitcoin whales sell over 30,000 BTC in the last 72 hours. Trader expects historic breakout for Bitcoin.

news.summary: NexGold Mining Corp. (TSXV: NEXG; OTCQX: NXGCF) provided an update on its 25,000-meter diamond drill program at the Goldboro Project in Nova Scotia. The program aims to enhance geological and grade continuity, potentially upgrading certain areas of Inferred and Indicated Mineral Resources. Three diamond drills have completed about 17,000 meters of drilling, with the program expected to finish by the end of Q2.
news.headline: NexGold's drilling program at Goldboro Gold Project in Nova Scotia progresses well with 17,000m completed; aims to improve mineral resource continuity.

news.summary: On May 16, 2025, in Boca Raton, Florida, DeFi Development Corp. (Nasdaq: DFDV) shared its groundbreaking move as the initial public company integrating a treasury strategy focused on accumulating and compounding Solana ("SOL"). The Company disclosed a significant alliance with BONK, the leading community memecoin within the Solana ecosystem, boasting a market capitalization surpassing $1.8 billion and a substantial token holder base of over 920,000 individuals.
news.headline: DeFi Dev Corp (Nasdaq: DFDV) partners with BONK, Solana memecoin with market cap over $1.8B, 920,000+ holders.

news.summary: In Warrington, Pennsylvania on May 16, 2025, Windtree Therapeutics, Inc. (NasdaqCM: WINT), primarily a biotechnology firm aiming to transition into a revenue generating entity while progressing early and late-stage cutting-edge treatments for critical ailments, disclosed its financial outcomes for the initial quarter ending on March 31, 2025, alongside significant business developments.
news.headline: Windtree Therapeutics (NasdaqCM: WINT) reports Q1 2025 financial results & key business updates for revenue-generating therapies.

news.summary: For a span of 44 consecutive quarters, Winnebago Industries has consistently paid out a quarterly dividend.
news.headline: Winnebago Industries' board approves quarterly cash dividend, marking 44 consecutive quarters of dividend payments.

news.summary: On May 16, 2025, Aligos Therapeutics, Inc. in South San Francisco disclosed that its Compensation Committee awarded a non-qualified stock option for the purchase of 26,000 shares of the company's stock to a new employee on May 13, 2025. This "Inducement Grant" is linked to the start of the employee's tenure with the company. Aligos is a clinical stage biopharmaceutical firm on Nasdaq under the symbol ALGS, specializing in top-tier therapies for liver and viral diseases to enhance patient outcomes.
news.headline: Aligos Therapeutics granted 26,000 stock options to new employee on May 13, 2025 under Nasdaq rule.

news.summary: On May 16, 2025, the Prosafe SE conducted its Extraordinary General Meeting (EGM) virtually through Lumi. The meeting saw the successful adoption of all agenda items as originally notified on April 25, 2025.
news.headline: Prosafe SE held virtual EGM, all proposals adopted, following notice on 25 April 2025.

news.summary: Windtree Therapeutics, Inc. reported their first-quarter financial results for 2025, revealing an operating loss of $4.1 million. They focused on becoming revenue-generating by acquiring FDA-approved assets, especially in cardiology and oncology. Windtree expanded its partnership in China to cut biopharmaceutical production costs by 65%. They closed a private placement for $2.6 million, regained Nasdaq compliance, and had $1.2 million in cash as of March 31, 2025. They also secured a multifamily residential property to boost revenue. The Company has ongoing clinical trials, like the istaroxime cardiogenic shock study targeted for Phase 3 in Q3 2025. The Company is developing various drug candidates and expanding its patent portfolio. They continue to meet regulatory and clinical trial challenges. The financial filings further detail their operations and future outlook.
news.headline: Windtree Therapeutics reported Q1 2025 results: Operating loss of $4.1 million, R&D expenses $2.3 million, and net loss $5.0 million.Windtree Therapeutics aims to become a revenue-generating biotech company, reported Q1 2025 financial results with an operating loss of $4.1 million, R&D expenses of $2.3 million, and net loss of $5.0 million. Company continues to focus on advancing its pipeline, highlighting progress in istaroxime cardiology and oncology programs, alongside strategic transactions for future revenue generation.

news.summary: NextNRG, Inc. reported its preliminary unaudited financial results for April 2025. The company's revenue for the month was $5.82 million, showing a significant increase of 154% year-over-year. They also reported delivering 1.78 million gallons of fuel, a surge of 207% compared to the previous year. These results were driven by sustained volume increases and expansion into Oklahoma, as well as a rising demand from national fleet clients. NextNRG's Executive Chairman and CEO, Michael D. Farkas, emphasized the company's strong business model and execution strategy, highlighting their focus on reliability, efficiency, and sustainability in fuel delivery. They are also planning to scale their Utility Operating System, AI-powered microgrid systems, and wireless EV charging products. This growth is seen as a reflection of their ability to rapidly expand while maintaining operational efficiency and creating long-term value.
news.headline: NextNRG's April 2025 revenues surged 154% year-over-year, reaching $5.82 million, with 1.78 million gallons delivered, up 207%.

news.summary: On May 16, 2025, Replimune Group, Inc., a leading biotechnology company listed on NASDAQ under the symbol REPL, revealed plans for upcoming events. These include a conference call set for May 22, 2025, at 8:00 a.m. ET to review financial outcomes for the fiscal fourth quarter and year ending March 31, 2025. Furthermore, an Investor Day is scheduled for June 24, 2025.
news.headline: Replimune to report fiscal Q4 and year end 2025 results on May 22, 2025 8:00 am ET; Investor Day on June 24, 2025.

news.summary: On May 16, 2025, Spectral Medical Inc. revealed its participation in a fireside chat at the 3rd Annual H.C. Wainwright BioConnect Investor Conference on May 20, 2025. The event, scheduled for 11:30 a.m. ET at the Nasdaq headquarters in New York City, New York, will feature discussions by Spectral’s management team. Spectral, a late-stage theranostic company focused on improving treatment options for sepsis and septic shock, operates under the stock symbol TSX: EDT. This conference signifies a significant step for the company in its mission to advance therapies for these critical medical conditions.
news.headline: Spectral Medical to present at 3rd Annual H.C. Wainwright BioConnect Investor Conference on May 20, 2025, in NY at 11:30 am ET. (Numbers: TSX: EDT, May 16, 2025)

news.summary: In Orlando, Florida on May 16, 2025, IZEA Worldwide, Inc. (NASDAQ: IZEA) launched a revised "Dutch auction" tender offer called the Offer to buy back a maximum of $8,700,000 worth of its common stock. IZEA is a top influencer marketing firm specializing in Creator Economy tools for advertisers.
news.headline: IZEA starts Dutch auction tender offer to buy $8.7M of common stock. #influencermarketing #CreatorEconomy
